effects.text: Gain 6 Firewall.
Heal 5 HP.
Restore 2 RAM.
If an enemy is attacking this turn, Gain 6 Firewall and heal 5HP.
Enemies cannot heal this round.
Strip all Firewall from ALL enemies.
Gain 10 Firewall.
Heal 8 HP.
Apply 5 Corrode.
Apply 2 Underclock.
Apply 2 Exposed Ports.
Apply 1 Sensor Glitch.
Apply Target Spoof (next attack targets a random valid target).
Restore 3 RAM.
Gain 4 RAM.
Gain 6 Firewall. | The next card you play also grants +4 Firewall. Can be this turn or next.
Gain 1 Overclock.
Gain 8 Firewall.
Gain 6 Nanoflow (heal over time).
Apply 4 Leak.
The next card you play costs -1 RAM (minimum 0).
Place a card from your hand into Removed for this combat.
Gain 8 Firewall.
Lose all RAM and heal by the amount spent.
Lose 5HP; restore 10 RAM
Deal 20 damage. One-Shot (after play, place into Removed for this combat).
Deal 8 damage to ALL enemies. Volatile (if in hand at end of turn, place into Removed for this combat).
Deal 5 damage. Draw 1. Volatile (if in hand at end of turn, place into Removed for this combat).
Deal 11 damage. If the enemy has any debuff, deal +6 more. One-Shot (after play, place into Removed for this combat).
Deal 35 damage. Lose 6 HP. One-Shot (after play, place into Removed for this combat).
Gain 8 Firewall. Volatile (if in hand at end of turn, place into Removed for this combat).
Gain 14 Firewall. One-Shot (after play, place into Removed for this combat).
Gain 10 Firewall. Heal 6 HP. One-Shot (after play, place into Removed for this combat).
Draw 2. Volatile (if in hand at end of turn, place into Removed for this combat).
Draw 3. Discard 1. Volatile (if in hand at end of turn, place into Removed for this combat).
The next Attack you play this turn costs 0 RAM and deals +6 damage. One-Shot (after play, place into Removed for this combat).
Gain +3 RAM this turn only. At end of turn, lose 5 HP. One-Shot (after play, place into Removed for this combat).
Draw 1. Gain 6 Firewall. Volatile (if in hand at end of turn, place into Removed for this combat).
Heal 12 HP. You cannot Heal again this turn. One-Shot (after play, place into Removed for this combat).
Discard your hand. Draw 4. One-Shot (after play, place into Removed for this combat).
Scry 3 (look at the top 3 cards of your draw pile; discard any number; put the rest back on top in any order).
Scry 2.
Scry 6.
Look at the top 5 cards of your draw pile. Put 2 back on top in any order. Discard the rest.
Put 1 card from your hand on top of your draw pile. Draw 2.
Put the leftmost card in your hand on top of your draw pile. Draw 1.
Choose 1 card in your discard pile. Put it on top of your draw pile.
Choose 1 card in your discard pile. Add it to your hand.
Remove up to 2 cards in your discard pile from combat (send them to Removed).
Search your draw pile for an Attack card. Add it to your hand. Shuffle.
Search your draw pile for a Support card. Add it to your hand. Shuffle.
Search your draw pile for a Defense card. Add it to your hand. Shuffle.
Search your draw pile for any card. Add it to your hand. Shuffle.
Shuffle your discard pile into your draw pile. Draw 1.
Shuffle your hand into your draw pile. Draw 5.
Draw 2. Discard 1.
Discard up to 2 cards. Then draw that many cards.
Look at the top card of your draw pile. You may discard it. Otherwise, draw it.
POWER: At the start of your turn, gain +1 RAM.
POWER: At the end of your turn, gain 3 Firewall.
POWER: Whenever you apply a Debuff, deal 3 damage to that enemy.
POWER: The first time you draw each turn, draw 1 additional card.
POWER: The first time each turn you gain Firewall, gain +2 additional Firewall.
POWER: Whenever you play an Attack, gain 1 RAM.
POWER: At end of turn, if you did not take damage this turn, heal 3 HP.
POWER: When you play a One-Shot or Volatile card, draw 1.
POWER: The first time each turn you deal damage, deal +6 additional damage to that target.
POWER: At the start of your turn, remove 1 Debuff from yourself.
POWER: At end of turn, you may keep 1 card in your hand (it is not discarded).
POWER: At end of turn, put the top card of your discard pile on top of your draw pile.
POWER: When you defeat an enemy, gain +10 Credits.
POWER: The first time an enemy intends to heal, cancel that heal.
POWER: At the start of your turn, if your hand is empty, draw 2.
Spend all remaining RAM. Deal 6 damage per RAM spent.
Spend all remaining RAM. Deal 3 damage to ALL enemies per RAM spent.
Spend all remaining RAM. Gain 4 Firewall per RAM spent.
Spend all remaining RAM. For each RAM spent: Deal 3 damage and gain 3 Firewall.
Spend all remaining RAM. Heal 2 HP per RAM spent.
Spend all remaining RAM. Draw 1 card per RAM spent (max 6).
Spend all remaining RAM. Next turn, gain 1 RAM per RAM spent.
Spend all remaining RAM. Add 1 temporary 'Thread' (0 RAM: Deal 2, Draw 1) to your hand per RAM spent. Threads Exhaust.
Spend all remaining RAM. Apply 1 stack of THROTTLED to a target enemy per RAM spent.
Spend all remaining RAM. Deal 4 damage per RAM spent. If the target has any debuff, gain 1 RAM back per 2 RAM spent (rounded down).
Spend all remaining RAM. Gain 7 Firewall per RAM spent. At end of turn, lose 1 HP per RAM spent.
Spend all remaining RAM. Remove (Exhaust) 1 random non-core card from your hand per RAM spent. Draw that many cards.
No effect. At end of turn: place this into Removed (auto-purged).
At end of turn: take 2 damage. Then place this into Discard.
Unplayable. If drawn: take 1 damage. (Stays in deck unless removed.)
While in hand: enemies deal +1 damage to you. At end of turn: discard this.
At start of your turn: lose 1 RAM this turn only. Then discard this.
If you play a card while this is in hand: take 2 damage, then discard this.
Unplayable. End of turn: lose 4 Firewall (if any), then discard this.
Unplayable. When drawn: discard a random card from hand.
Add 1 Malware Stub into your Discard.
Add 1 Trace Beacon into your Discard. Gain 8 Firewall.
Deal 5 damage to ALL enemies. Add 1 Overheat into your Discard.
Add 1 Corrupted Sector into your Discard.
Add 2 Dazed Packets into your Discard.
Heal 8 HP. Add 1 Burn Stack into your Discard.
Remove up to 2 Status/Junk cards from your hand or discard (place into Removed). Draw 1.
Gain 18 Firewall. If you have any Status/Junk in hand, place 1 of them into Removed.
Remove 1 Status/Junk from your Discard (place into Removed). Heal 6 HP. Restore 2 RAM.
Place ALL Status/Junk cards in your hand into Removed. Then draw that many cards.
Strip 10 Firewall. Deal 7 damage.
Lose all Firewall. Deal that much damage.
Gain 18 Firewall.
Gain 12 Firewall. | Next turn, gain 6 Firewall.
Heal 18 HP.
Gain 14 Nanoflow.
Gain 4 RAM.
Apply 12 Corrode.
Apply 3 Sensor Glitch.
Apply Target Spoof to all enemies.
Gain 2 Overclock. | Gain 2 RAM.
Apply 3 Underclock.
Select a card in your hand; place it into Removed for this combat.
Until end of turn, ignore a random negative mutation trigger on the next card played.
If played, gain 15 Credits after this combat. Can stack.
Lose all Firewall. Deal that much damage to ALL enemies.
Gain 28 Firewall.
Heal 25 HP. | Next turn, gain 3 RAM.
For the rest of this turn, playing cards does not consume RAM.
Double your current RAM (up to your max) for this turn.
Discard your hand. | Gain RAM equal to the discarded cards' total RAM costs.
Swap one mutation on this card with a mutation on another card in your hand. | This change is reverted at end of combat.
Select another card in your hand; reduce its mutation counter by this card's RAM cost.
Reduce mutation progress on a chosen card by 5. | Add +5 mutation progress to this card.
Remove the weakest enemy from combat. | The strongest enemy gains the removed enemy's max HP, attack cards, and gains 2 Overclock.
Remove the strongest enemy from combat. | Distribute its current HP evenly among remaining enemies; apply 2 Sensor Glitch to all enemies.
Steal 1 random enemy card for this combat (it enters your hand).
Steal 1 random enemy card for this combat (it enters your hand). | If stolen card is an Attack, apply 1 Target Spoof to the enemy that played it.
No effect.
When this card triggers a mutation event, trigger TWO mutations instead of one. | Double first mutation for free, add +1 RAM to cost to roll a different second mutation
Gain +6 RAM.
Heal 30 HP.
Gain 28 Firewall.
No effect; mutates after first use, then second, fourth, eighth, sixteenth, etc. 32nd use will J-Brick.
No effect; mutates on every prime number. Bricks on 53rd use.
Restore all health immediately.
Restore all RAM immediately. Low-tier mutations each turn; bricks quickly.
Lose all Firewall. Deal that much damage.
Strip 8 Firewall. Deal 6 damage.

ScrapPlating.name: Scrap Plating
ScrapPlating.description: Reduce the first hit you take each combat by 4

Overclock.name: Overclock
Overclock.description: First card played each turn costs 1 less RAM

Stimpak.name: Stimpak
Stimpak.description: Heal 4 HP after every normal combat

WornToolkit.name: Worn Toolkit
WornToolkit.description: At run start, one random card in your deck is Repaired

SignalJammer.name: Signal Jammer
SignalJammer.description: Enemies deal 2 less damage on their first action each combat

ThermalSink.name: Thermal Sink
ThermalSink.description: Increased core stability provides flat HP

DebugLog.name: Debug Log
DebugLog.description: Every 5th card played in a single combat costs 0 RAM

PatchNotes.name: Patch Notes
PatchNotes.description: Whenever a card mutates, choose from 3 options instead of 2

CoolingFan.name: Cooling Fan
CoolingFan.description: Whenever you play a 'Repair' card, gain 4 Firewall

BlackIce.name: Black Ice
BlackIce.description: Whenever an enemy inflicts a debuff on you, deal 3 damage back

FragmentationCache.name: Fragment Cache
FragmentationCache.description: Gain 35g whenever you remove a card from your deck

GhostProtocol.name: Ghost Protocol
GhostProtocol.description: The first card you play each combat costs 0 RAM

KillSwitch.name: Kill Switch
KillSwitch.description: Killing an enemy heals you 3 HP

CorrodeCore.name: Corrode Core
CorrodeCore.description: Your Corrode stacks deal +1 damage per tick

ExploitFramework.name: Exploit Frame
ExploitFramework.description: Gain an extra 25g after every Elite encounter

CascadeProtocol.name: Cascade Protocol
CascadeProtocol.description: Whenever one of your cards mutates during combat, gain 8g

VampiricAPI.name: Vampiric API
VampiricAPI.description: Restore 20% dmg as HP; cannot heal at rooms or events

GlitchFilter.name: Glitch Filter
GlitchFilter.description: Whenever a card is discarded, deal 3 damage to a random enemy

BufferOverflow.name: Buffer Overflow
BufferOverflow.description: If you end your turn with 0 RAM, draw 1 card next turn

MirrorArray.name: Mirror Array
MirrorArray.description: The first time an enemy attacks each combat, reflect the damage

HardenedKernel.name: Hardened Kernel
HardenedKernel.description: Immune to Vulnerable; you can no longer gain Strength buffs

ProtocolBreach.name: Protocol Breach
ProtocolBreach.description: If you play cards of 3 different types in one turn, gain 1 RAM

MemoryLeak.name: Memory Leak
MemoryLeak.description: Every 3rd card played is Exhausted but deals double effect

SingularityChip.name: Singularity Chip
SingularityChip.description: Below 25% HP, restore 20 HP (Once per combat)

ViralPayload.name: Viral Payload
ViralPayload.description: Cards that deal damage also apply 1 Corrode to the target

NeuralOverride.name: Neural Override
NeuralOverride.description: After playing a 0-RAM card, draw 1 card (once per turn)

PurgeEngine.name: Purge Engine
PurgeEngine.description: Removing a card via event adds a random card to your deck

RedundantSystems.name: Redundant Sys
RedundantSystems.description: At 0 uses, restore 2 uses before final mutation

GlassCannon.name: Glass Cannon
GlassCannon.description: Deal 50% more damage, but Max HP is reduced by 15

QuantumProcessor.name: Quantum Proc
QuantumProcessor.description: Whenever you play a card, 50% chance to double or Exhaust it

RecursiveLoop.name: Recursive Loop
RecursiveLoop.description: When a card mutates, add a base version copy to your discard

VoidPointer.name: Void Pointer
VoidPointer.description: Cards with the Exhaust keyword are played twice

SystemAdminKey.name: System Key
SystemAdminKey.description: Free shop rerolls and lower risk during events

GoldScraper.name: Gold Scraper
GoldScraper.description: Receive a high initial funding for the run

TheDaemon.name: The Daemon
TheDaemon.description: Cards deal +3 damage; start combat with 3 Corrode on self

NeuralBurnout.name: Neural Burnout
NeuralBurnout.description: Max RAM is doubled, but take 2 damage every turn

DeadMansChip.name: Dead Man Chip
DeadMansChip.description: Once per run, a lethal hit leaves you at 1 HP

OverclockSuite.name: Overclock Suite
OverclockSuite.description: Mutate 2x faster; applied mutations are 1 tier weaker

TheSingularity.name: Singularity
TheSingularity.description: Cannot draw at turn start; choose 1 of 3 cards to Download

CursedCompiler.name: Cursed Comp
CursedCompiler.description: +2 RAM; play cards to add Junk Data (Curse) to deck

FirewallPrime.name: Firewall Prime
FirewallPrime.description: Immune to first 3 hits each combat

ThrottledProc.name: Throttled Proc
ThrottledProc.description: Max RAM is capped at 3; all cards cost max 1 RAM

EntropyEngine.name: Entropy Engine
EntropyEngine.description: Taking damage draws 1 card; no longer draw at turn start

Firewall.name: Firewall
Firewall.notes: Persistent cyber shield that carries across turns but soft-decays by 20% each turn and caps at current HP

Leak.name: Leak
Leak.notes: Enables enemy multi-hit preference; also used for combo rules

Corrode.name: Corrode
Corrode.notes: Firewall erosion plus direct integrity burn each turn

Overclock.name: Overclock
Overclock.notes: Increases damage or RAM regen placeholder (decays)

TraceBeacon.name: Trace Beacon
TraceBeacon.notes: Mark that persists; used for tracking / escalation
